name: Monocular V1 multichannel recording in ferret
description: Plexon S probe inserted into V1 at 30-45 degrees from cortical surface, starting from minimum depth 200 um; advance electrode until monocular neurons found (receptive fields in periphery of eye contralateral to recording hemisphere, verified by absence of response to central/ipsilateral stimulation); map RF manually with drifting-grating patches; run Stimulus Set 1 (orientation x SF x contrast, TF=4 Hz) and Stimulus Set 2 (direction x TF, SF=0.1, contrast=1); advance electrode at least 640 um before next site; DiI-coated marking electrode inserted post-hoc for track reconstruction.
